title: Kai's Black Hole
description: Add a black hole that slowly consumes your world and gets bigger, can you survive it?
body:
Unleash the Ultimate Cosmic Force in Your World

Introducing the Black Hole Mod 

Brace yourself for an experience that will warp the very fabric of your Minecraft universe. This mod unleashes the awe-inspiring power of black holes, chaos to your gameplay.

Prepare to be mesmerized and terrified as you witness:

  • A swirling vortex of darkness, capable of devouring everything in its path: blocks, mobs, items, and even unsuspecting players. A swirling black hole in Minecraft, consuming blocks and items.: image of black hole mod in Minecraft (not yet fully implemented)
  • An insatiable gravitational pull that draws everything closer, testing your agility and reflexes as you navigate its relentless force.
  • A growing singularity that expands over time, consuming more and more of the world, leaving behind a haunting trail of emptiness. (in development)

Key Features:

  • Spawn black holes with a simple command.
  • Witness the mesmerizing visual effects of these cosmic entities, complete with particle trails and gravitational distortions. (incomplete)
  • Strategize to harness the power of black holes for your own purposes, or risk being consumed by their destructive force.
  • Customize the size, strength, and behavior of black holes to create unique challenges and gameplay experiences through simple commands.

Adventure Awaits Beyond the Event Horizon: (Soon™️)

  • Defend your world against the relentless pull of black holes, protecting your creations and resources.
  • Embark on daring expeditions to explore the mysteries surrounding these cosmic phenomena.
  • Master the art of gravity manipulation, using black holes to transport blocks, items, and even yourself to new locations.
  • Devise clever traps and strategies to defeat your enemies by luring them into the inescapable grasp of a black hole.

Download the Black Hole Mod today and prepare to experience Minecraft like never before!

Warning: This mod is not for the faint of heart. Proceed with caution, and remember: once you cross the event horizon, there’s no turning back. (This mod is in development and any requests/issues reported will be appreciated!)

Avaiable commands:

Base command: /blackhole

  1. spawn <pos>: summon a black hole at desired position.
  2. function <arg>:
      - toggle <true/false>: toggle the functions of the black hole
      - grow <speed>: change the growth speed of the black hole
  3. clear <range>: deletes all the black hole in the radius
  4. weight <entity> <value>: set the size of the selected black hole to the desired value
